_metadata.purpose: City-level data for 10 P1 countries - hospitals, mortuaries, airports, death scenarios, repatriation logistics
_metadata.confidence_note: Hospital and mortuary names should be VERIFIED before publishing. Patterns and logistics are reliable. All phone numbers marked VERIFY.

cities.name: Madrid
cities.relevance: Capital and main hub for document processing. British Embassy location. Major international airport with full cargo.
cities.british_presence: Large British business traveller and tourist population. Less dominant than coastal resorts.

hospitals.name: Hospital Universitario La Paz
hospitals.notes: Major public hospital. Interpreter services available. VERIFY

mortuaries_forensic.name: Instituto Anatómico Forense de Madrid
mortuaries_forensic.notes: Main forensic facility. Handles non-natural deaths, autopsies. VERIFY

cities.local_funeral_directors: Several international funeral directors in Madrid handle repatriation cases. English-speaking services available. VERIFY specific firms.
cities.transport_to_hub: Madrid IS the main hub. Direct international cargo flights.
cities.content_angle: Embassy city. Document processing hub. British business traveller deaths.

cities.name: Barcelona
cities.relevance: Second city, major tourist destination. International airport with cargo. High British tourist volume.
cities.british_presence: High. Stag/hen parties, city breaks, cruise port. Younger demographic than coastal resorts.

hospitals.name: Hospital de la Santa Creu i Sant Pau

mortuaries_forensic.name: Institut de Medicina Legal i Ciències Forenses de Catalunya

cities.local_funeral_directors: International repatriation services available in Barcelona. English-speaking firms exist. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Catalan bureaucracy (some differences from rest of Spain)
Petty crime can complicate documents (stolen passports)
cities.transport_to_hub: Barcelona has its own international cargo. No transfer needed.
cities.content_angle: Balcony falls and nightlife deaths. Younger British demographic. High emotional impact cases for families.

cities.name: Malaga (Costa del Sol)
cities.relevance: Gateway to Costa del Sol. Enormous British expat and retiree population. Highest concentration of British repatriation cases in Spain.
cities.british_presence: Very high. Estimated 300,000+ British residents along Costa del Sol. Large elderly retiree population. Most British deaths in Spain originate here.

hospitals.name: Hospital Regional Universitario de Malaga
hospitals.notes: Main public hospital. Limited English. VERIFY

hospitals.name: Hospital Quironsalud Malaga
hospitals.notes: Private. English-speaking. Popular with expats. VERIFY

mortuaries_forensic.name: Instituto de Medicina Legal de Malaga
mortuaries_forensic.notes: Forensic facility for Malaga province. VERIFY

cities.local_funeral_directors: Multiple English-speaking funeral directors serving British community. Well-established repatriation corridor to UK. VERIFY specific firms.
common_death_scenarios: Natural causes (elderly retiree population - heart attacks, strokes, cancer)
local_challenges: Volume of cases means experienced local infrastructure
Elderly population means complex medical histories
cities.transport_to_hub: Malaga airport has direct UK cargo flights. Well-established repatriation corridor.
cities.content_angle: THE main British repatriation origin in Spain. Elderly retiree deaths dominate. Well-worn path means faster processing but families still need guidance. High volume = experienced local providers.

cities.name: Alicante (Costa Blanca)
cities.relevance: Second major British expat hub on Spanish coast. Large retiree community in surrounding towns (Benidorm, Torrevieja, Javea).
cities.british_presence: Very high. Benidorm alone has massive British presence. Retiree and long-stay community. Second to Costa del Sol for British deaths.

mortuaries_forensic.name: Instituto de Medicina Legal de Alicante

cities.local_funeral_directors: English-speaking funeral directors available, especially in Benidorm and Torrevieja. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Similar challenges to Costa del Sol
cities.transport_to_hub: Alicante airport handles UK cargo. No transfer needed.
cities.content_angle: Benidorm and Costa Blanca retiree deaths. Second corridor after Malaga. Similar profile.

cities.name: Tenerife (Canary Islands)
cities.relevance: Major British holiday destination. Year-round tourism. Different logistics from mainland Spain.
cities.british_presence: High. Popular winter sun destination. Mix of tourists and long-stay residents.

hospitals.name: Hospital Universitario Nuestra Señora de Candelaria

mortuaries_forensic.name: Instituto de Medicina Legal de Santa Cruz de Tenerife

cities.local_funeral_directors: English-speaking services available in tourist areas. Repatriation experience with UK corridor. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Island logistics (limited cargo flight frequency vs mainland)
cities.transport_to_hub: Tenerife South airport has UK flights with cargo capacity. No mainland transfer needed usually.
cities.content_angle: Island logistics add a layer. Canary Islands have slightly different administrative processes from mainland Spain. Year-round British deaths (winter sun visitors).

cities.name: Paris
cities.relevance: Capital and main hub. British Embassy location. Busiest airports in France. High tourist volume.
cities.british_presence: Very high tourist volume. Business travellers. Proximity to UK makes this a major corridor.

mortuaries_forensic.name: Institut Médico-Légal de Paris
mortuaries_forensic.notes: Main forensic facility. Seine riverbank. VERIFY

cities.local_funeral_directors: Pompes Funèbres Générales (PFG) is the largest chain. International repatriation firms available. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Procureur de la République controls release of body in non-natural deaths
cities.transport_to_hub: Paris CDG is the main hub. Direct cargo to UK.
cities.content_angle: Proximity to UK makes France seem simple, but French legal requirements (Procureur control) can delay repatriation. Families assume it will be quick because it's close. Often it isn't.

cities.name: Nice (Côte d'Azur)
cities.relevance: Gateway to French Riviera. Significant British tourist and expat population. International airport.
cities.british_presence: High. Riviera attracts wealthier British tourists and retirees. Monaco proximity.
cities.local_funeral_directors: Repatriation services available. English-speaking firms in Riviera area. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Same French legal framework as Paris
cities.transport_to_hub: Nice airport has direct UK flights with cargo. No transfer needed.
cities.content_angle: Riviera deaths. Wealthier demographic. Monaco deaths may route through Nice. Close to Italy border (jurisdictional considerations).

cities.name: Lyon
cities.relevance: Third largest city. Business travel hub. Interior France transit point.
cities.british_presence: Moderate. Business travellers and cultural tourists.
cities.local_funeral_directors: Available but less international experience than Paris or Riviera. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Less English spoken than Paris or Riviera
Gateway to Alps - ski deaths may present here
cities.transport_to_hub: Lyon airport has some UK flights. Transfer to Paris CDG for full cargo options.
cities.content_angle: Alps gateway. Ski season deaths may pass through Lyon. Business travellers.

cities.name: Marseille
cities.relevance: Second largest city. Major port. Mediterranean coast.
cities.british_presence: Moderate. Cruise port. Some tourist traffic.
cities.local_funeral_directors: Available. Less international experience. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Parts of Marseille have high crime
cities.transport_to_hub: Marseille airport has some UK cargo options. Paris CDG is backup.
cities.content_angle: Cruise port deaths. Mediterranean coast. Less established repatriation corridor than Paris or Nice.

cities.name: Bangkok
cities.relevance: Capital and main international airport hub. ALL repatriation cases transit through Bangkok for international cargo. Embassy location.
cities.british_presence: High. Business travellers, tourists, expats. Major stopover city.

hospitals.name: Bumrungrad International Hospital
hospitals.notes: World-class. English standard. Medical tourism hub. VERIFY

hospitals.name: Siriraj Hospital
hospitals.notes: Oldest and largest public hospital. VERIFY

mortuaries_forensic.name: Forensic Medicine, Police General Hospital
mortuaries_forensic.notes: Handles unnatural deaths. Police cases. VERIFY

cities.local_funeral_directors: Several experienced international repatriation firms. Thai funeral directors used to handling foreign cases. VERIFY specific firms.
local_challenges: Multiple government offices in different locations
cities.transport_to_hub: Bangkok IS the hub. BKK is the main international cargo airport.
cities.content_angle: Embassy city and document hub. Most repatriation paperwork processed here even if death occurred elsewhere in Thailand.

cities.name: Phuket
cities.relevance: Thailand's biggest beach resort island. High volume of British tourist deaths. Has international airport but limited cargo.
cities.british_presence: Very high. Package holidays, backpackers, long-stay tourists. Significant death volume.

mortuaries_forensic.name: Vachira Phuket Hospital Mortuary
mortuaries_forensic.notes: Handles most forensic cases. Also dealt with 2004 tsunami DVI. VERIFY

cities.local_funeral_directors: Several firms experienced with British repatriation. Island has well-established corridor. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Island infrastructure occasionally disrupted by weather
cities.transport_to_hub: Phuket airport has some international cargo direct. Many cases transfer via Bangkok BKK for wider airline options.
cities.content_angle: Drowning and motorbike deaths dominate. Families often on holiday when the call comes. High emotional impact. Well-worn repatriation path.

cities.name: Chiang Mai
cities.relevance: Northern Thailand hub. Popular with digital nomads, retirees, cultural tourists.
cities.british_presence: Moderate to high. Growing expat and long-stay community. Older demographic.

mortuaries_forensic.name: Maharaj Nakorn Chiang Mai Hospital Mortuary

cities.local_funeral_directors: Available but less international experience than Bangkok or Phuket. VERIFY.
cities.transport_to_hub: Chiang Mai has limited international cargo. Most cases transfer to Bangkok BKK.
cities.content_angle: Expat and digital nomad deaths. Trekking accidents. Growing retiree community.

cities.name: Pattaya
cities.relevance: Major resort city near Bangkok. High British tourist volume. Notorious for nightlife-related incidents.
cities.british_presence: Very high. Package holidays, long-stay visitors, retirees, nightlife tourism.

mortuaries_forensic.name: Local hospital mortuary
mortuaries_forensic.notes: Complex cases transferred to Bangkok. VERIFY

cities.local_funeral_directors: Available. English-speaking. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Nightlife deaths can involve complex police investigation
cities.transport_to_hub: 2 hours drive to Bangkok BKK. Easy transfer.
cities.content_angle: Close to Bangkok means faster logistics than island deaths. But nightlife context means potentially complex police involvement.

cities.name: Koh Samui
cities.relevance: Island resort. Significant British tourist presence. Remote island logistics.
cities.british_presence: High tourist season. Full Moon Party on nearby Koh Phangan attracts younger British tourists.
cities.local_funeral_directors: Limited. Most serious cases coordinated with Bangkok firms. VERIFY.
common_death_scenarios: Full Moon Party related (nearby Koh Phangan)
local_challenges: Island airport is privately owned (Bangkok Airways) - limited cargo
Ferry + domestic flight needed to get remains to Bangkok
Remote location adds days to timeline
cities.transport_to_hub: Samui airport has NO international cargo. Body must be transported to Bangkok via domestic flight or ferry+road. Adds 1-3 days.
cities.content_angle: Island isolation makes this one of the more complex Thai repatriations. Full Moon Party context (Koh Phangan deaths process through Samui).

cities.name: New York City
cities.relevance: Largest US city. Major British visitor destination. Multiple international airports. British Consulate General.
cities.british_presence: Extremely high tourist and business volume. Large British expat community.

hospitals.name: Bellevue Hospital Center
hospitals.notes: Oldest public hospital in US. NYC OCME attached. VERIFY

mortuaries_forensic.name: Office of Chief Medical Examiner (OCME) NYC
mortuaries_forensic.notes: Handles all unnatural deaths in NYC. Well-resourced. VERIFY

cities.local_funeral_directors: Numerous. International repatriation firms readily available. English is not a barrier.
local_challenges: US medical costs are astronomical (not relevant post-death but context)
NYC OCME efficient but can hold bodies for investigation
cities.transport_to_hub: JFK has extensive international cargo. Direct London flights with BA, Virgin, etc.
cities.content_angle: Straightforward logistics but US costs are high. Insurance coverage critical. NYC OCME is efficient but thorough.

cities.name: Los Angeles
cities.relevance: Second largest US city. Major tourist destination. LAX is a major cargo hub.
cities.british_presence: High tourist volume. Entertainment industry connections.

mortuaries_forensic.name: LA County Department of Medical Examiner-Coroner
mortuaries_forensic.notes: Handles unnatural deaths. Large operation. VERIFY

cities.local_funeral_directors: Numerous. International repatriation services available.
cities.transport_to_hub: LAX has direct London cargo. No transfer needed.
cities.content_angle: Car accident deaths common due to driving culture. Vast geographic spread of LA County.

cities.name: Miami
cities.relevance: Major tourist destination. Cruise port. Gateway to Caribbean. High British visitor numbers.
cities.british_presence: High. Beach holidays, cruises, Florida Keys.
cities.local_funeral_directors: Numerous. International repatriation well-established.
local_challenges: Cruise ship deaths may have maritime jurisdiction complications
cities.transport_to_hub: MIA has direct London cargo.
cities.content_angle: Cruise deaths and beach tourism. Florida Keys remoteness. Elderly British visitors in Florida.

cities.name: Las Vegas
cities.relevance: Major British tourist destination. Unique circumstances around deaths.
cities.british_presence: High. Holiday destination. Stag/hen parties. Conventions.

hospitals.name: University Medical Center of Southern Nevada
hospitals.notes: Only Level 1 trauma centre in state. VERIFY

mortuaries_forensic.name: Clark County Office of the Coroner/Medical Examiner

cities.local_funeral_directors: Available. International repatriation firms exist.
local_challenges: Clark County coroner can be slow
cities.transport_to_hub: LAS has some direct UK flights. Cargo may route via LAX or JFK.
cities.content_angle: Party destination deaths. Alcohol and heat combination. Desert context unique.

cities.name: Orlando
cities.relevance: Disney World and theme parks. Very popular British family holiday destination.
cities.british_presence: Very high. Family holidays dominate. Theme parks, villa rentals.

hospitals.name: Orlando Health - Orlando Regional Medical Center

cities.local_funeral_directors: Available. British tourist deaths well-understood locally.
local_challenges: Family holiday deaths are emotionally devastating
Villa pool drownings a recurring pattern
cities.transport_to_hub: MCO has direct UK flights (Virgin, BA). Cargo available.
cities.content_angle: Family holiday deaths. Villa pool drownings are tragically common. Theme park medical emergencies. Emotionally hardest scenario for families.

cities.name: Athens
cities.relevance: Capital. British Embassy location. Main international cargo airport. Document processing hub.
cities.british_presence: High. City break destination. Transit to islands.
cities.local_funeral_directors: Repatriation firms available. English-speaking. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Strike action can close government offices
cities.transport_to_hub: Athens IS the main cargo hub.
cities.content_angle: Document processing hub for all Greek island deaths that need international cargo. Greek bureaucracy is the main challenge.

cities.name: Crete (Heraklion)
cities.relevance: Largest Greek island. Major British holiday destination. Has international airport.
cities.british_presence: Very high. Package holidays. All-inclusive resorts. Elderly tourists.
cities.local_funeral_directors: Available in Heraklion. English-speaking for tourist areas. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Mountain road accidents in remote areas
cities.transport_to_hub: Heraklion has direct UK flights with cargo capacity seasonally. Off-season routing via Athens.
cities.content_angle: Largest island. Samaria Gorge hiking deaths. Quad bike and road accidents on mountain roads. Elderly all-inclusive tourist deaths.

cities.name: Rhodes
cities.relevance: Major British package holiday island. Significant tourist death volume.
cities.british_presence: Very high in summer. Package holidays dominate.
cities.local_funeral_directors: Limited. May need coordination with Athens firms. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Limited local capacity for complex cases
cities.transport_to_hub: Rhodes airport has seasonal UK flights. Off-season transfer to Athens required.
cities.content_angle: Island with single hospital. Young tourist deaths (quad bikes, alcohol, drowning). Seasonal logistics challenge.

cities.name: Corfu
cities.relevance: Popular British holiday island. Package tours and villa holidays.
cities.british_presence: High in summer. Family holidays and couples.
cities.local_funeral_directors: Limited local capacity. VERIFY.
cities.transport_to_hub: Corfu has seasonal direct UK charter flights. Off-season transfer to Athens via short domestic flight.
cities.content_angle: Small island, limited infrastructure. Boat and water-related deaths. Family holiday context.

cities.name: Istanbul
cities.relevance: Largest city. Major tourist destination. New Istanbul Airport is a mega cargo hub. British Consulate.
cities.british_presence: High. City breaks, cultural tourism, business. Growing.

hospitals.name: Acıbadem Healthcare Group
hospitals.notes: Major private chain. Multiple locations. VERIFY

mortuaries_forensic.name: Istanbul Forensic Medicine Institute (Adli Tıp Kurumu)

cities.local_funeral_directors: Several experienced firms. Turkish Airlines cargo is excellent. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Islamic customs may differ from family expectations
cities.transport_to_hub: Istanbul Airport is a global cargo hub. Turkish Airlines Cargo has excellent network. Direct London flights.
cities.content_angle: Turkish Airlines is actually an advantage: one of the best cargo networks globally. Istanbul Airport modern and efficient.

cities.name: Antalya
cities.relevance: Turkey's main beach resort coast. Enormous British tourist volume. International airport with UK cargo.
cities.british_presence: Very high. Package holidays dominate. All-inclusive resorts. Mix of ages.
cities.local_funeral_directors: Available. Experienced with British repatriations given tourist volume. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Excursion accident deaths (rafting, quad bikes, boat trips)
cities.transport_to_hub: Antalya airport has direct UK flights with cargo. Peak season good frequency. Off-season may route via Istanbul.
cities.content_angle: THE main British resort death origin in Turkey. All-inclusive hotel deaths. Excursion accidents. Heat and elderly visitors.

cities.name: Bodrum
cities.relevance: Upmarket Turkish resort. Growing British tourist market.
cities.british_presence: Moderate to high. Wealthier demographic than Antalya. Yacht tourism.
cities.local_funeral_directors: Available. Less volume than Antalya. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Yacht deaths may involve coastguard/maritime issues
cities.transport_to_hub: Bodrum airport has seasonal UK flights. Transfer via Istanbul for off-season.
cities.content_angle: Upmarket Turkish destination. Yacht and boat deaths. Smaller infrastructure.

cities.name: Dalaman
cities.relevance: Gateway airport for Fethiye, Marmaris, Oludeniz. Popular British resort coast.
cities.british_presence: High. Package holiday gateway. Fethiye and Oludeniz very popular with British tourists.
cities.local_funeral_directors: Available in Fethiye. VERIFY.
common_death_scenarios: Paragliding accidents (Oludeniz is global paragliding centre)
local_challenges: Scattered resort towns need internal transport to Dalaman
cities.transport_to_hub: Dalaman airport has seasonal UK charter flights with cargo. Off-season via Istanbul.
cities.content_angle: Paragliding deaths in Oludeniz are a recurring story. Fethiye/Marmaris resort deaths. Lycian Way hiking incidents.

cities.name: Lisbon
cities.relevance: Capital. British Embassy location. International cargo airport. Growing British tourist market.
cities.british_presence: High and growing. City breaks booming. Business travel.

mortuaries_forensic.name: Instituto Nacional de Medicina Legal (INML) - Lisbon

cities.local_funeral_directors: Available. International repatriation firms. VERIFY.
cities.transport_to_hub: Lisbon IS the main hub.
cities.content_angle: Growing tourist destination. Embassy city. Document processing centre for Algarve deaths.

cities.name: Algarve (Faro)
cities.relevance: THE main British holiday region in Portugal. Elderly retiree community. Most British deaths in Portugal originate here.
cities.british_presence: Very high. Large British retiree and expat community. Package holidays. Golf tourism.
cities.local_funeral_directors: English-speaking firms available. Experienced with British repatriations. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Similar to Spanish costas: elderly population, natural causes dominate
Good English-speaking infrastructure due to expat community
cities.transport_to_hub: Faro airport has direct UK flights with cargo. Well-established corridor.
cities.content_angle: Mirror image of Costa del Sol. Elderly British retirees. Natural causes dominate. Well-worn repatriation path. Golf tourism cardiac deaths.

cities.name: Porto
cities.relevance: Second city. Growing British city break destination. Douro Valley gateway.
cities.british_presence: Growing. City breaks, port wine tourism, Douro Valley cruises.
cities.local_funeral_directors: Available. Less international experience than Algarve. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Less established British infrastructure than Algarve
cities.transport_to_hub: Porto airport has UK flights with cargo.
cities.content_angle: Growing market. Douro Valley cruise deaths. Port wine tourism. Less established than Algarve.

cities.name: Madeira (Funchal)
cities.relevance: Island destination popular with British tourists. Elderly demographic.
cities.british_presence: Moderate. Older demographic. Year-round mild climate attracts retirees.
cities.local_funeral_directors: Limited. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Island logistics (limited flight frequency vs mainland)
Levada walk accidents in remote areas
cities.transport_to_hub: Funchal airport has some UK flights. Transfer via Lisbon for more options.
cities.content_angle: Island with unique levada hiking deaths. Elderly British market. Mountain road accidents.

cities.name: Rome
cities.relevance: Capital. British Embassy location. Major international airport with full cargo.
cities.british_presence: Very high tourist volume. Cultural tourism. Business travel.

mortuaries_forensic.name: Istituto di Medicina Legale, Sapienza University

cities.local_funeral_directors: International repatriation firms available. VERIFY.
cities.transport_to_hub: Rome Fiumicino has direct London cargo.
cities.content_angle: Embassy city. Document processing hub. Italian bureaucracy is the main challenge. August shutdown warning.

cities.name: Milan
cities.relevance: Business capital. Major airport hub. Northern Italy gateway.
cities.british_presence: High business travel. Fashion and design tourists.

mortuaries_forensic.name: Istituto di Medicina Legale di Milano

cities.local_funeral_directors: Available. Northern Italy more efficient than south. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Northern Italy generally faster bureaucracy than south
Malpensa is far from city centre
cities.transport_to_hub: Malpensa has direct London cargo.
cities.content_angle: Business travel deaths. Northern Italy efficiency advantage. Lake Como/Alps nearby for tourist deaths.

cities.name: Florence
cities.relevance: Major cultural tourism destination. Study abroad students. British tourists.
cities.british_presence: High tourist volume. Art and cultural tourism. Study abroad.
cities.local_funeral_directors: Available. Tourist city has some international capacity. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Transfer to Pisa or Rome for cargo flights
cities.transport_to_hub: Florence airport has NO significant cargo capacity. Transfer to Pisa (PSA, ~1hr) or Rome (FCO) for international cargo.
cities.content_angle: Cultural tourism deaths. Transfer needed to Pisa or Rome for cargo. Tuscany road accidents.

cities.name: Naples
cities.relevance: Gateway to Amalfi Coast, Pompeii, Capri. Growing British tourist market.
cities.british_presence: Growing. Amalfi Coast, Sorrento, Capri are very popular.

hospitals.name: Ospedale Cardarelli
hospitals.notes: Major hospital, can be chaotic. VERIFY

cities.local_funeral_directors: Available but southern Italy can be less efficient. VERIFY.
common_death_scenarios: Road accidents (Amalfi Coast roads are treacherous)
local_challenges: Amalfi Coast road deaths in remote areas
Capri is an island - additional transport layer
cities.transport_to_hub: Naples airport has some international cargo. Complex cases may route via Rome.
cities.content_angle: Amalfi Coast road deaths are a recurring pattern. Capri and island access complications. Southern Italy bureaucracy.

cities.name: Venice
cities.relevance: Major British tourist destination. Unique water-based logistics.
cities.british_presence: High. City breaks, cruise port.

hospitals.name: Ospedale Civile Santi Giovanni e Paolo
hospitals.notes: Main hospital in Venice. Water ambulance access. VERIFY

cities.local_funeral_directors: Limited due to island nature. Transfers to mainland (Mestre) common. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Water-based city: ambulance by boat, body transport by boat
cities.transport_to_hub: Marco Polo airport on mainland has cargo. Body must be transported from Venice island by water then road.
cities.content_angle: Only city where body transport is by water ambulance. Canal drowning unique scenario. Cruise port deaths.

cities.name: Delhi (New Delhi)
cities.relevance: Capital and main administrative hub. British High Commission location. Major international airport. Most document processing happens here or Mumbai.
cities.british_presence: High. Business travel, cultural tourism, Golden Triangle. Large British Indian diaspora connections.

hospitals.name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS)
hospitals.notes: Premier national hospital. English standard. VERIFY

cities.local_funeral_directors: Multiple firms handle international repatriation. English widely spoken. VERIFY specific firms.
local_challenges: Indian bureaucracy is legendary (4-6 weeks average for repatriation)
Police investigation mandatory for all non-hospital deaths
cities.transport_to_hub: Delhi IS a main hub. Direct London flights with cargo (AI, BA, Virgin).
cities.content_angle: Administrative hub but Indian bureaucracy makes this one of the slowest repatriation origins globally. British Indian diaspora reverse repatriation is a major market.

cities.name: Mumbai
cities.relevance: Financial capital. Major international airport. British Consulate. Second busiest for British repatriations from India.
cities.british_presence: High. Business travel. British Indian diaspora connections. Bollywood tourism.
cities.local_funeral_directors: Several firms specializing in international repatriation. English standard. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Monsoon season (Jun-Sep) causes additional transport disruption
Train deaths are common and police investigation mandatory
cities.transport_to_hub: Mumbai BOM has direct London flights with cargo.
cities.content_angle: Financial hub. Monsoon disruption adds seasonal challenge. Train-related deaths a unique Mumbai pattern.

cities.name: Goa
cities.relevance: Major British tourist destination in India. Beach holidays. Backpacker scene. Significant death volume.
cities.british_presence: High. Package holidays, backpackers, yoga retreats, long-stay visitors.

mortuaries_forensic.name: Goa Medical College Mortuary
mortuaries_forensic.notes: Handles all forensic cases in Goa. VERIFY

cities.local_funeral_directors: Available. Some experience with British cases given tourist volume. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Drug-related deaths involve complex police investigation
Backpacker scene means some deaths involve young people in risky situations
cities.transport_to_hub: Goa has limited international cargo. Most cases transfer to Mumbai for international flights. Adds 1-2 days.
cities.content_angle: Tourist beach deaths. Drug scene deaths (Scarlett Keeling case established pattern). Younger demographic than other Indian cities. Transfer to Mumbai for cargo.

cities.name: Chennai
cities.relevance: Southern India hub. British Indian diaspora connections to Tamil Nadu. IT industry.
cities.british_presence: Moderate. British Tamil community connections. Some business travel (IT sector).
cities.local_funeral_directors: Available. VERIFY.
cities.transport_to_hub: Chennai has direct UK flights (SriLankan, Singapore Airlines connecting). Some direct cargo options.
cities.content_angle: Diaspora reverse repatriation. Tamil community connections. Southern India hub.

cities.name: Kolkata
cities.relevance: Eastern India hub. British colonial history. Bengali diaspora connections.
cities.british_presence: Moderate. British Bengali community connections. Cultural/historical tourism.
cities.local_funeral_directors: Available. VERIFY.
cities.transport_to_hub: Kolkata has limited direct international cargo to UK. Transfer via Delhi or connecting flights.
cities.content_angle: Bengali diaspora connections. Eastern India hub. Less established repatriation corridor.

cities.name: Cairo
cities.relevance: Capital. British Embassy location. Main international airport. Document processing hub.
cities.british_presence: Moderate. Cultural tourism (Pyramids, Egyptian Museum). Business travel.
cities.local_funeral_directors: Available. International repatriation firms exist. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Procurator General controls body release in non-natural deaths
cities.transport_to_hub: Cairo IS the main hub. Direct London flights with cargo (EgyptAir, BA).
cities.content_angle: Embassy and document hub. All Red Sea resort deaths need paperwork processed through Cairo.

cities.name: Sharm el-Sheikh
cities.relevance: Main British resort destination in Egypt. Red Sea diving. Package holidays.
cities.british_presence: High. Package holidays dominate. Diving tourism. All-inclusive resorts.

mortuaries_forensic.name: Local hospital mortuary
mortuaries_forensic.notes: Limited facility. Complex cases transfer to Cairo. VERIFY

cities.local_funeral_directors: Limited. Coordination with Cairo firms standard. VERIFY.
common_death_scenarios: Diving accidents (decompression, oxygen toxicity, shark attacks rare)
local_challenges: Diving deaths need specialist forensic examination
cities.transport_to_hub: Sharm has direct UK flights with some cargo. Complex cases transfer to Cairo.
cities.content_angle: THE diving death destination. Decompression sickness, diving accidents dominate the serious cases. Red Sea resort package holiday deaths.

cities.name: Hurghada
cities.relevance: Second main Red Sea resort. Growing British tourist market.
cities.british_presence: High and growing. Package holidays, diving, water sports.
cities.local_funeral_directors: Limited. Cairo coordination. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Shark attack deaths get massive media attention
cities.transport_to_hub: Hurghada has direct UK flights. Cargo capacity available.
cities.content_angle: Second Red Sea resort. Similar profile to Sharm. Shark attack cases (rare but high-profile). El Gouna resort area.

cities.name: Luxor
cities.relevance: Nile cruise hub. Ancient temple tourism. Elderly tourist demographic.
cities.british_presence: Moderate. Nile cruise tourists. Cultural tourism. Older demographic.
cities.local_funeral_directors: Very limited. Cairo coordination essential. VERIFY.
local_challenges: Nile cruise deaths may occur mid-river (jurisdiction)
cities.transport_to_hub: Luxor airport has limited cargo. Most cases transfer to Cairo by road or domestic flight.
cities.content_angle: Nile cruise deaths. Elderly tourists. Extreme heat. Body must be transferred to Cairo for international cargo.
